sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection performance and safety test reports for Abyz Digital Detector models G1417 and G1717 variants.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as performance and safety confirmation material for domestic manufacturing certification technical documentation.
keyPoints: Reports identify Product Name as Abyz Digital Detector.
Eight detector models are covered: G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, and G1717FWP.
Reports include supplier product history, mechanical information, electrical safety test, performance information, and combination test sections.
Electrical safety testing includes power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current tests.
Combination testing confirms power on/off, wired communication, and image acquisition in wired communication state.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is inferred from source metadata authoritySignal and file path; the extracted source text does not explicitly name MFDS.
No standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
The combined source contains multiple reports with different inspection/manufacture dates, so documentDate is represented as a date range.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspelling 'Acquision Software' and an implausible G1717FW weight result shown as 30.500 while the specification is 3.00 to 3.40 kg.
